headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Monster Beverage (MNST) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains?
summary: Wondering if Monster Beverage at about US$87 per share still offers value or if the easy gains are behind it? This breakdown will help you frame the stock price in terms of what you are actually paying for. The stock has returned 0.9% over the last week, 15.6% over the last month, 14.4% year to date, 38.5% over 1 year, 45.9% over 3 years and 89.3% over 5 years. This raises fair questions about how much future upside is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Monster...
